title: trifolium eriosphaerum
intro: Trifolium eriosphaerum, also known as the button clover, is a species of legume in the family Fabaceae. This plant is used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is valued for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Trifolium eriosphaerum include its ability to treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. Trifolium eriosphaerum is often prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, or used in tincture form, to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
